.input-field-placeholder.is-empty { opacity: 1; } body.animation-level-2 .input-field-placeholder.is-empty { transform: trans= late(0px); } .input-field-right-label { position: absolute; inset-inline-end: 1rem; top:= 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: 1; color: var(--secondary-text-= color); } .input-fields-row { display: flex; } .input-fields-row .input-field { flex: 1 1 auto; width: 1%; } .input-wrapper { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; grid-template-columns: 100%; } ::placeholder { color: rgb(144, 145, 146); opacity: 1; } input:focus, button:focus { outline: none; } .input-clear { outline: none; border: none; padding: 0px; } body.animation-level-0 .input-clear.error { color: var(--danger-color) !imp= ortant; } body:not(.animation-level-0) .input-clear.error { animation: 0.2s ease-in-o= ut 0s 1 normal forwards running input-shake; } @keyframes input-shake {=20 0% { transform: translate(0px); } 25% { transform: translate(-0.5rem); } 75% { transform: translate(0.5rem); } 100% { transform: translate(0px); } } .input-search { --border-width: 1px; --height: 42px; --border-radius: 22px;= --icon-left-add-offset: 0rem; --icon-left-offset: calc(.8125rem + var(--ic= on-left-add-offset)); --icon-size: 1.5rem; --padding-horizontal: calc(var(-= -height) + 3px + var(--icon-left-add-offset) - var(--border-width)); positi= on: relative; width: 100%; margin-inline: 0.4375rem; overflow: hidden; disp= lay: flex; align-items: center; } @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .input-search { margin-inline-start: 1rem; } } @keyframes grow-input {=20 0% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: var(--max-opacity, 1); } } @keyframes hide-input {=20 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: var(--max-opacity, 1); } 100% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0; } } body.animation-level-2 .input-search .will-animate { animation: 0.25s ease-= in-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grow-input; } body.animation-level-2 .input-search .will-animate.is-hiding { animation: 0= .25s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal forwards running hide-input; } body.animation-level-0 .input-search .will-animate.is-hiding { opacity: 0; = } .input-search.show-placeholder .input-search-placeholder { display: block != important; } .input-search.old-style .input-search-input { background-color: var(--old-i= nput-background-color); border-color: transparent; } .input-search-placeholder { position: absolute; color: rgb(158, 158, 158); = z-index: 1; white-space: nowrap; inset-inline-start: calc(var(--padding-hor= izontal) + var(--border-width)); pointer-events: none; transform-origin: le= ft center; } .input-search-input { --border-width: inherit; --padding-horizontal: inheri= t; background-color: var(--input-search-background-color); padding: 0px var= (--padding-horizontal); height: var(--height); border-color: var(--input-se= arch-border-color); line-height: var(--line-height-16); min-height: var(--h= eight) !important; max-height: var(--height) !important; } body.animation-level-2 .input-search-input { transition: background-color 0= .2s ease-in-out, border-color 0.2s ease-in-out; } translate3d(0,calc(100%= + var(--push-quiz, 10px)),0); } .quiz-hint.active { transform: translateZ(0px); } .quiz-hint-container { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); backdrop-filter: var= .quiz-hint-container.has-right-text { justify-content: space-between; flex:= 1 1 auto; } @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .quiz-hint-container { padding: 10px 18px 12px 54px; margin: 0px z-index: 2; font-si= ze: var(--font-size-14); border-radius: 2rem; white-space: pre; display: fl= ex; align-items: center; } .extended-media-buy-icon { margin-right: 0.25rem; font-size: 1.125rem; } .appear-zoom { transform: scale(0); } body.animation-level-2 .appear-zoom { transition: transform 0.1s; } .appear-zoom--active { transform: scale(1); }
